name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Must-have. Conquered the fashion world before launch. Nostalgic Rive Gauche, named after the Paris street Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps. It's simply too fun!
Model: 2020
Size: 23x16x6cm
